🎉 Create a Board

Create Recognition Spaces That Bring Teams Together

Give your organization a shared place where appreciation is visible, persistent, and felt by everyone — across every team and timezone.

Create a WallSee How It Works
WorkKudo — Appreciation Walls
E

"Your leadership made this launch possible 🌟"

Engineering Team
S

"Thank you for always going above and beyond 💛"

Sarah M.
P

"Proudest moment of the quarter — your work! 🎉"

Product Team

Recognition Happens Privately and Is Quickly Forgotten

Most workplace recognition lives in private messages, one-on-one conversations, or fleeting chat threads that scroll away within hours.

Organizations need a central, persistent space where employees can publicly celebrate achievements, share appreciation, and acknowledge contributions in a way that the whole team can see and participate in.

1Private praise disappears — it doesn't build team culture
2Recognition is inconsistent across departments and teams
3Managers carry the burden of recognition alone
4Remote employees feel overlooked and disconnected
✨ Appreciation Wall
🌟Shout-out

Thank You, Priya!

"Your calm under pressure during the launch week kept the whole team going. We wouldn't have shipped without you."

Daniel OkaforVP of Engineering
💛Appreciation

Always Going Above & Beyond

"Every single detail you caught saved us hours. You make this team better every day — thank you."

Sophie LavalProduct Lead
🏆Recognition

Standout Performer This Quarter

"The way you mentored new joiners while delivering your own work was remarkable. Truly inspiring."

Marcus WebbHead of People

Everything Your Team Needs to Recognize Each Other

Appreciation Walls bring together messages, media, milestones, and contributors in one shared experience.

1 / 6
📝

Rich Appreciation Posts

Team members add messages, photos, GIFs, and videos to create meaningful, personal recognition posts.

How It Works

01
✨

Create

Set up an Appreciation Wall for any occasion. Choose a layout, set a recipient, and add a delivery date.

02
📩

Invite

Share a private link with teammates. No account required — anyone can contribute instantly.

03
💬

Participate

Team members add messages, photos, GIFs, and reactions at their own pace, from anywhere.

04
🎉

Celebrate

Deliver a beautiful, unforgettable appreciation experience. Download and keep it forever.

✨

Create

Set up an Appreciation Wall for any occasion. Choose a layout, set a recipient, and add a delivery date.

Use Cases

See how organizations put Appreciation Walls to work.

🎂

Employee Appreciation Day

Create a company-wide wall that celebrates everyone's contributions across all departments.

🏆

Team Recognition

Acknowledge a team's achievement after a successful launch, project, or quarter.

🌟

Employee Spotlights

Feature individuals who go above and beyond, making their contributions visible to the whole organization.

👋

Farewells & Departures

Send off a valued colleague with hundreds of personal messages in one beautiful board.

🎂

Employee Appreciation Day

Create a company-wide wall that celebrates everyone's contributions across all departments.

🏆

🏢

Company Milestones

Celebrate the organization's journey — anniversaries, product launches, and company achievements.

🤝

Peer-to-Peer Recognition

Empower every employee to recognize colleagues without needing manager involvement.

💼

Leadership Appreciation

Let teams show gratitude upward — recognizing leaders who made a positive difference.

🎊

Workplace Celebrations

From promotions to personal milestones, celebrate every meaningful moment together.

🎊

Workplace Celebrations

Why It Matters

🌱

Stronger Culture

Visible recognition builds a culture where appreciation is the norm, not the exception.

💬

More Recognition Moments

Lower the barrier for every employee to celebrate colleagues, not just managers.

👁️

Better Visibility

Achievements stay visible over time rather than disappearing into message history.

🤝

Employee Belonging

Employees who feel seen and appreciated are more connected and engaged at work.

🔗

Team Connection

Shared recognition creates connection between colleagues across teams and locations.

📈

Improved Retention

Recognized employees are more likely to stay. Appreciation walls make recognition consistent.

Appreciation Walls — FAQs

Everything you need to know about creating and sharing Appreciation Walls.

Start Recognizing Your Team Today

Create an Appreciation Wall that your team will remember. Set it up in minutes, invite everyone, and celebrate together.
